Historic Setting: Privada Lodge - Historic Hotel in Kratie offers a unique adults-only experience with a sun terrace, garden, restaurant, bar, and free WiFi.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, balconies, and modern amenities. Guests enjoy amenities such as a minibar, work desk, and soundproofing.
Dining Experience: The traditional restaurant serves French cuisine with vegetarian options. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, and fresh fruits.
Leisure Activities: Activities include pub crawls, film nights, walking tours, hiking, and cycling. Nearby attractions include Phnom Sambok Pagoda (11 km) and The 100-Column Pagoda (37 km).
